name: China
summary: Day 73-74 (Mon-Tue). **B4 TRUMP CHINA STATE VISIT MAY 14-15 CONFIRMED — Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi; Iran on agenda; Trump will press Xi on China's financial support for Iran and 'dual-use goods.' Per Bloomberg sources, a major Iran military decision is unlikely before departure. China previously gave Sec Def Hegseth assurance (April 16) NOT to send weapons to Iran. The pause window (May 13 afternoon → May 15-16) coincides exactly with Trump 1-week clock close (May 14), effectively MEANING the clock-close CANNOT trigger an immediate kinetic response** (CONFIRMED — Bloomberg primary, SCMP, PBS, Al Jazeera, CNBC). **B7 NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 PRIMARILY TARGETS IRAN→CHINA OIL CHAIN: 12 entities (4 Hong Kong, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals over IRGC Shaid Purja'fari oil HQ + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company facilitating Iranian oil sales to China; builds on July 2025 Golden Globe designations** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary). Treasury Sec Bessent: continue using sanctions to deprive Iran funding; May 12 designations added Iranian nuclear research with military applications. Real financial action (secondary-sanctions risk for downstream Chinese and Gulf intermediaries). USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, -0.5% 1M, -1.7% 3M) — no current weaponization risk priced; if Trump-Xi summit fails on Iran/dual-use issue, USD/CNY could break 6.85+. Shanghai Composite 4,208.73 (-0.4% 1D, +5.3% 1M); Hang Seng 26,367.49 (-0.1% 1D). China May trade-data weakness contributes to Aluminum LME -2.3% counter-narrative (China property + global industrial moderation). **Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on OFAC sanctions tranche** (commercial reasons — China is primary buyer of Iranian oil with secondary-sanctions exposure). TASS/Pravda silent on WSJ UAE-Lavan story. Tasnim's Velayati (Iran Supreme Leader adviser) Trump-Xi summit-timed jab: 'Mr. Trump, never imagine that by taking advantage of Iran's calm, you will be able to enter Beijing triumphantly.' Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. PRIOR FRAMING: Russia offered China energy lifeline (April 15) — pipeline + rail alternatives reduce but do not replace Hormuz exposure. Iran is ~13% of China imports; >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz.

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Chinese MFA spokesperson: attack and killing of Khamenei is 'grave violation of sovereignty | China provided missile spare parts, advanced radar systems, BeiDou-3 encrypted navigation for Iranian military, satellite intelligence suppo

10 signals. China is a NET BENEFICIARY of the crisis: (1) Manufacturing PMI 50 | China positioning as potential peace broker per CNN — Beijing moving from posturing to possible active mediation, which would be a major geo | China is net beneficiary of crisis (discounted Russian/Iranian crude)
